name: Orange Glazed Carrots
recipeIngredient: 6 medium Carrots, peeled and thinly sliced
3 tablespoons Dark brown sugar, firmly packed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a deep, 1-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole.
2. Heat, covered, in Microwave Oven for 6 to 8 minutes or until carrots are tender. Stir occasionally so that the carrots are well glazed.
